formulas.name: Triangle Area - Basic
formulas.formula:
Area = ½ × Base × Height
For right triangle: Area = ½ × base × height

examples.q: Triangle with base 12cm, height 8cm. Find area.

formulas.name: Equilateral Triangle
formulas.formula:
Area = (sqrt(3)/4) × a²
Height = (sqrt(3)/2) × a
Perimeter = 3a

examples.q: Equilateral triangle side = 6 cm. Find area.

formulas.name: Heron's Formula
formulas.formula:
s = (a+b+c)/2
Area = sqrt[s(s-a)(s-b)(s-c)]
Where s = semi-perimeter

examples.q: Triangle sides: 13, 14, 15. Find area.

formulas.name: Pythagoras Theorem
formulas.formula:
c² = a² + b²
Hypotenuse = sqrt(a²+b²)
Common triples: (3,4,5), (5,12,13), (8,15,17), (7,24,25)

examples.q: Right triangle with legs 3cm and 4cm. Find hypotenuse.

formulas.name: Circle Basic Formulas
formulas.formula:
Area = pr²
Circumference = 2pr
Diameter = 2r

examples.q: Circle radius = 7cm. Find area. (p=22/7)

formulas.name: Circle Sector and Segment
formulas.formula:
Sector Area = (?/360°) × pr²
Arc Length = (?/360°) × 2pr
Segment Area = Sector Area - Triangle Area

examples.q: Sector with r=7cm, ?=60°. Find area.

formulas.name: Rectangle Formulas
formulas.formula:
Area = length × width
Perimeter = 2(length + width)
Diagonal = sqrt(length² + width²)

examples.q: Rectangle 8cm × 6cm. Find area and perimeter.

formulas.name: Square Formulas
formulas.formula:
Area = side²
Perimeter = 4 × side
Diagonal = side × sqrt(2)

vars.d: Length of one side of square

examples.q: Square side = 5cm. Find area and diagonal.

formulas.name: Parallelogram Formulas
formulas.formula:
Area = base × height
Perimeter = 2(length + width)
Diagonal formulas use law of cosines

examples.q: Parallelogram base=10cm, height=6cm. Find area.

formulas.name: Rhombus Formulas
formulas.formula:
Area = (d1 × d2)/2
Area = base × height
Perimeter = 4 × side

examples.q: Rhombus diagonals 12cm and 16cm. Find area.

formulas.name: Trapezium (Trapezoid)
formulas.formula:
Area = (1/2) × (a + b) × h
Perimeter = a + b + c + d
Where a,b are parallel sides

examples.q: Trapezium with parallel sides 8cm and 12cm, height 6cm. Find area.

formulas.name: Cube Formulas
formulas.formula:
Volume = a³
Surface Area = 6a²
Diagonal = a × sqrt(3)
Space Diagonal = a × sqrt(3)

examples.q: Cube with edge 5cm. Find volume and surface area.

formulas.name: Cuboid Formulas
formulas.formula:
Volume = length × width × height
Surface Area = 2(lw + lh + wh)
Diagonal = sqrt(l² + w² + h²)

examples.q: Cuboid 6cm × 4cm × 3cm. Find volume.

formulas.name: Cylinder Formulas
formulas.formula:
Volume = pr²h
Curved Surface Area = 2prh
Total Surface Area = 2pr(r + h)

examples.q: Cylinder r=7cm, h=10cm. Find volume. (p=22/7)

formulas.name: Cone Formulas
formulas.formula:
Volume = (1/3)pr²h
Slant Height l = sqrt(r² + h²)
Curved Surface Area = prl
Total Surface Area = pr(r + l)

examples.q: Cone r=3cm, h=4cm. Find volume.

formulas.name: Sphere Formulas
formulas.formula:
Volume = (4/3)pr³
Surface Area = 4pr²
Diameter = 2r

examples.q: Sphere radius = 7cm. Find surface area. (p=22/7)

formulas.name: Hemisphere Formulas
formulas.formula:
Volume = (2/3)pr³
Curved Surface Area = 2pr²
Total Surface Area = 3pr²

examples.q: Hemisphere radius = 7cm. Find volume. (p=22/7)

formulas.name: Frustum of Cone
formulas.formula:
Volume = (1/3)ph(R² + r² + Rr)
Slant Height = sqrt((R-r)² + h²)
Curved Surface Area = p(R + r)l

examples.q: Frustum R=8cm, r=4cm, h=6cm. Find volume.

formulas.name: Triangle Properties
formulas.formula:
Sum of angles = 180°
Exterior angle = Sum of opposite interior angles
In any triangle: a/sin A = b/sin B = c/sin C

examples.q: Triangle angles: 60°, 70°. Find third angle.

formulas.name: Similar Triangles
formulas.formula:
If triangles are similar:
Ratio of corresponding sides = k
Ratio of areas = k²
Ratio of volumes = k³

examples.q: Similar triangles with side ratio 2:3. Area ratio?

formulas.name: Circle Properties
formulas.formula:
Tangent is perpendicular to radius
Angle in semicircle = 90°
Equal chords subtend equal angles
Central angle = 2 × inscribed angle

examples.q: Central angle = 80°. Find inscribed angle subtending same arc.

formulas.name: Quadrilateral Properties
formulas.formula:
Sum of interior angles = 360°
Parallelogram: Opposite sides equal, opposite angles equal
Rectangle: All angles = 90°, diagonals equal
Rhombus: All sides equal, diagonals perpendicular

examples.q: Three angles of quadrilateral: 80°, 110°, 90°. Find fourth.

formulas.name: Regular Polygon
formulas.formula:
Interior angle = (n-2) × 180°/n
Exterior angle = 360°/n
Sum of interior angles = (n-2) × 180°

examples.q: Regular hexagon. Find each interior angle.

formulas.name: Area of Regular Polygon
formulas.formula:
Area = (1/2) × Perimeter × Apothem
Apothem = side/(2 × tan(180°/n))

examples.q: Regular hexagon side = 6cm. Find area.

formulas.name: Coordinate Geometry - Distance
formulas.formula:
Distance between (x1,y1) and (x2,y2):
d = sqrt[(x2-x1)² + (y2-y1)²]

examples.q: Distance between (2,3) and (5,7).

formulas.name: Coordinate Geometry - Section Formula
formulas.formula:
Point dividing (x1,y1) and (x2,y2) in ratio m:n:
x = (mx2 + nx1)/(m+n), y = (my2 + ny1)/(m+n)

examples.q: Find point dividing (2,3) and (8,9) in ratio 2:1.

formulas.name: Coordinate Geometry - Line Equation
formulas.formula:
Slope form: y - y1 = m(x - x1)
Two-point form: (y-y1)/(y2-y1) = (x-x1)/(x2-x1)
Intercept form: x/a + y/b = 1

examples.q: Line through (1,2) with slope 3. Find equation.

formulas.name: 3D Coordinate Geometry
formulas.formula:
Distance between (x1,y1,z1) and (x2,y2,z2):
d = sqrt[(x2-x1)² + (y2-y1)² + (z2-z1)²]

examples.q: Distance between (1,2,3) and (4,6,8).
Triangle with vertices (0,0), (4,0), (0,3). Find area.

formulas.name: Volume of Pyramid
formulas.formula:
Volume = (1/3) × Base Area × Height
Square Pyramid: V = (1/3) × a² × h

vars.d: Perpendicular height from base to apex

examples.q: Square pyramid base 6cm, height 9cm. Find volume.

formulas.name: Surface Area of Pyramid
formulas.formula:
Total Surface Area = Base Area + Lateral Surface Area
Lateral Area = (1/2) × Perimeter × Slant Height

vars.d: Height of triangular face from base to apex

examples.q: Square pyramid base 6cm, slant height 5cm. Find lateral area.

formulas.name: Prism Volume
formulas.formula:
Volume = Base Area × Height
Triangular Prism: V = (1/2) × base × height × length

examples.q: Triangular prism base 4cm, height 3cm, length 10cm. Find volume.

formulas.name: Torus Volume and Area
formulas.formula:
Volume = 2p²Rr²
Surface Area = 4p²Rr
Where R = major radius, r = minor radius

vars.d: Distance from center to tube center

examples.q: Torus with R=8cm, r=3cm. Find volume.

formulas.name: Ellipsoid Volume
formulas.formula:
Volume = (4/3)pabc
Where a,b,c are semi-axes lengths

examples.q: Ellipsoid with a=4cm, b=3cm, c=2cm. Find volume.

formulas.name: Area of Ring (Annulus)
formulas.formula:
Area = p(R² - r²)
Where R = outer radius, r = inner radius

examples.q: Ring with outer radius 8cm, inner radius 5cm. Find area.

formulas.name: Area of Path Around Rectangle
formulas.formula:
Area of path = Area of outer rectangle - Area of inner rectangle
If path width = w: Outer dimensions = (l+2w) × (b+2w)

vars.d: Length and breadth of inner rectangle

examples.q: Rectangle 20m × 10m with path 2m wide around it. Find path area.

formulas.name: Cost of Painting/Fencing
formulas.formula:
Cost = Area × Rate per unit
Fencing Cost = Perimeter × Rate per unit
Painting Cost = Surface Area × Rate per unit

vars.d: Cost per unit area or length

examples.q: Paint walls of room 5m × 4m × 3m at ?10/m². Find cost (excluding floor and ceiling).

formulas.name: Volume of Water Tank
formulas.formula:
Volume in liters = Volume in m³ × 1000
1 m³ = 1000 liters

examples.q: Tank 2m × 1.5m × 1m. Find capacity in liters.

formulas.name: Surface Area to Volume Ratio
formulas.formula:
SA:V = Surface Area / Volume
Important for heat transfer and chemical reactions

examples.q: Cube 2cm edge. Find SA:V ratio.

formulas.name: Geometric Probability
formulas.formula: Probability = Favorable Area / Total Area

examples.q: Dart thrown at square 10cm side. Target circle radius 3cm. Find probability.

formulas.name: Locus Problems
formulas.formula:
Locus: Set of points satisfying given condition
Example: Points at distance r from fixed point = circle

examples.q: Find equation of locus of points 5 units from origin.

formulas.name: Transformation Geometry
formulas.formula:
Translation: (x,y) -> (x+a, y+b)
Rotation 90°: (x,y) -> (-y, x)
Reflection in x-axis: (x,y) -> (x, -y)

examples.q: Point (3,4) rotated 90° about origin. Find new position.

formulas.name: Vector Geometry Basics
formulas.formula:
Position vector: r = xi + yj + zk
Magnitude: |r| = sqrt(x² + y² + z²)
Dot product: a·b = |a||b|cos?

examples.q: Vector v = 3i + 4j. Find magnitude.

formulas.name: 3D Geometry - Planes
formulas.formula:
Plane equation: ax + by + cz + d = 0
Distance from point to plane: |ax1 + by1 + cz1 + d|/sqrt(a² + b² + c²)

examples.q: Distance from point (1,2,3) to plane 2x + y - z + 1 = 0.
